pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-001 (AI and Machine Learning/Task) scores 0.430 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.430) and is edge_case for the Operations Research Analyst role. Core role signal: 0 pattern match(es). Seniority is appropriate for this role.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.430), and AI and Machine Learning handling. Decision stands.
